message: ci: use pnpm for site workflows

files.patch:
@@ -7,7 +7,7 @@ on:
     branches: [main]
 
 env:
-  NODE_VERSION: "20"
+  NODE_VERSION: "24"
   ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED: "1"
 
 jobs:
@@ -22,13 +22,16 @@ jobs:
         uses: actions/setup-node@v4
         with:
           node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
-          cache: "npm"
+          cache: "pnpm"
+
+      - name: Enable pnpm
+        run: corepack enable
 
       - name: Install dependencies
-        run: npm ci
+        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
 
       - name: Build Astro site
-        run: npm run build
+        run: pnpm run build
 
       - name: Check build output
         run: ls -la dist/

@@ -7,7 +7,7 @@ on:
     branches: [main]
 
 env:
-  NODE_VERSION: "20"
+  NODE_VERSION: "24"
 
 jobs:
   lint:
@@ -21,10 +21,13 @@ jobs:
         uses: actions/setup-node@v4
         with:
           node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
-          cache: "npm"
+          cache: "pnpm"
+
+      - name: Enable pnpm
+        run: corepack enable
 
       - name: Install dependencies
-        run: npm ci
+        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
 
-      - name: Run Biome Check (includes linting and formatting)
-        run: npm run check
+      - name: Run lint and format check
+        run: pnpm run check
